news.t: It's time to scoop up undervalued stocks in this critical sector of the economy
BlackRock Debuts Active ETFs from its Global Allocation Franchise

holdings.infoBox: BDYN is an equity ETF with a total of 535 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 5.84%, Alphabet at 4.98%, Apple at 4.98%, Micron Technology at 3.14%, and Amazon.com at 3.02%.

overview.description: The iShares Dynamic Equity Active ETF (BDYN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking total returns through a globally diversified portfolio that primarily focuses on equity securities and equity-related derivatives. The portfolio is supplemented by fixed income, REITs, and commodities. BDYN was launched on Sep 12, 2025 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: BlackRock Debuts Active ETFs from its Global Allocation Franchise
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today, BlackRock announced the conversion of two mutual funds from its Global Allocation suite into active ETFs, creating the iShares Dynamic Equity Active ETF (NASDAQ: BDYN...
